# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKustoClusterResource [ExposeProperties]

Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKustoReadWriteDatabaseResource [ExposeProperties]

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/addAzureKustoCluster(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKustoClusterResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/addReadWriteDatabase(name: string, databaseName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKustoReadWriteDatabaseResource

Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/runAsEmulator(configureContainer?: callback) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKustoClusterResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/withCreationScript(script: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKustoReadWriteDatabaseResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/withHostPort(port: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Kusto/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureKustoEmulatorResource
